The overall sentiment of these customer reviews is overwhelmingly positive, with customers praising the high quality and delicious taste of the Mt. Kofinas Extra Virgin Olive Oil. Key product strengths mentioned include its pure and full taste, ideal for cooking, salads, and dressings, as well as its high quality and low acidity. Common complaints are not mentioned, as the reviews are primarily focused on the product's positive qualities. Customers also appreciate the personal touch of the company, with one reviewer mentioning the opportunity to sample the oil at farmers markets and get to know the person managing the production. Overall, the reviews suggest that Mt. Kofinas Extra Virgin Olive Oil is a premium product that is worth the extra cost.
